heroTitle: Helping Organisations Deliver Projects, Improve Operations, and Achieve Strategic Results
heroText: Civoris Consulting provides structured project management and business consulting support to organisations seeking operational clarity, efficient execution, and sustainable growth.
introTitle: Professional Consulting With an International Perspective
introText1: If there's one thing I'm certain of, it's that great businesses are built on great systems.
introText2: I'm Fulgence Mazie, though most people call me Clyde. As a Certified Project Management Professional (PMP®) and Chartered Manager (CMgr MCMI) with a First-Class Honours degree in Business and Management from the University of Derby, I've spent the past decade helping organisations solve complex challenges through strategic project management and business consulting.
introText3: My approach is centred on helping organisations navigate complexity by balancing structured governance with adaptive execution. Because I work across Agile, Scrum and Waterfall methodologies, I don't believe in one-size-fits-all frameworks. Instead, I tailor the approach to what your organisation actually needs. From meticulous planning and rigorous budget control to risk mitigation and stakeholder engagement, I help ensure strategic objectives are delivered on time, within scope and within budget. Ultimately, I specialise in transforming frustrating bottlenecks into streamlined, high-performing workflows.
introText4: When I'm not optimising business systems or playing football, I apply that same diagnostic mindset to one of my hands-on hobbies: learning diesel mechanics. Whether I'm troubleshooting a high-pressure common rail injection system or fine-tuning a project timeline, I simply enjoy working out how complex pieces fit together to achieve peak performance.
introText5: If you're looking for a trusted partner to improve project delivery, streamline operations, or lead organisational change with confidence, I'd be delighted to discuss how Civoris Consulting can help you achieve your goals.
qual1Text: Project Management Professional (PMP) certification demonstrating internationally recognised project leadership expertise.
qual2Text: First Class degree in Business and Management from the University of Derby, United Kingdom.
qual3Text: Chartered Manager (CMgr MCMI), a professional accreditation recognising excellence in leadership and management practice.
support1Text: Structured planning, timelines, execution strategies, and delivery coordination.
support2Text: Improving efficiency, reducing process friction, and strengthening organisational workflows.
support3Text: Supporting communication, alignment, and collaboration across teams and partners.
support4Text: Helping organisations execute projects and operational initiatives effectively.
support5Text: Designing more efficient systems and scalable operational structures.
support6Text: Supporting structured delivery of business, education, and operational initiatives.
step1Text: Analyse operational challenges, objectives, and organisational priorities.
step2Text: Develop practical and structured solutions aligned with business goals.
step3Text: Support effective execution with clarity, accountability, and coordination.
step4Text: Monitor outcomes and continuously improve systems and processes.
value1Text: Clear communication, structured delivery, and high professional standards.
value2Text: Ability to operate effectively across cultures, sectors, and environments.
value3Text: Emphasis on measurable impact, efficiency, and long-term value creation.
value4Text: Balancing operational detail with wider organisational objectives.
ctaTitle: Looking for Structured Project & Operational Support?
ctaText: Civoris Consulting works with organisations seeking practical consulting support, stronger operational systems, and effective project delivery.
